company.name: NAVANK
company.description: One of India's largest raw material suppliers for OFC, Data and Power cable industries. Expanding into US and European markets.

india.address: 276, Niligiri Apartment, Alaknanda, New Delhi 110019, India

product_categories.name: Optical Fiber Cable
product_categories.description: Raw materials for manufacturing optical fiber cables

products.name: Water Blocking Tape
products.description: Used in power, fibre and copper telecom cable to prevent longitudinal water penetration. Available in Non-conductive, Semi-conductive and PET laminated versions.

products.name: Water Swellable Yarn
products.description: Quick water absorption, high expansivity, high tensile strength, good heat resistance, high chemical stability. Used in waterproof FOC & communication cables.

products.name: ECCS Tape
products.description: Copolymer coated steel tape made from high quality cold rolled steel tape with EAA copolymer film. Used for armouring fiber optical cable against rodents & external forces.

products.name: CJB (Controlled Jacket Bond) ECCS Tape
products.description: Low carbon electrolytically chrome coated steel tape tempered to T3, for telecommunication cables. Provides controlled jacket bond to LDPE, MDPE and HDPE.

products.name: PBT Compounds for Loose Tube
products.description: Most popular extrudable polymer compound for loose tubes in fiber-optic cables. Allows 2-24 optical fibers to move freely inside the loose tube with petroleum jelly.

products.name: LSZH Compounds (OFC)
products.description: Polyolefin based Insulation & Sheathing Compounds with LSZH, HFFR, ZHFR properties. For Fiber-optic, LAN, Solar, Automobile, Railway, and Elevator cables.

product_categories.name: Power Cable
product_categories.description: Raw materials for manufacturing power cables

products.name: XLPE Compound
products.description: Cross-linked polyethylene insulation for all types of power and special cables. Available in Peroxide-type for HV & EHV cables and Silane-type for special cables.

products.name: Semiconductive Compound
products.description: Cross-linkable black polyethylene compound for semiconductive conductor shields or bonded/strippable insulation shields of power cables.

products.name: LSZH Compound (Power Cable)
products.description: Cable sheathing material for power cables. Meets safety, flame retardant, mechanical strength, and reliability requirements.

products.name: PE Compound
products.description: Used for sheathing and insulation of power cables and special cables. Full range: HDPE, MDPE, LDPE & FR-HDPE.

products.name: Mica Tape
products.description: Insulation material for fire-resistant cables. Made of phlogopite mica paper, synthetic mica paper, and calcined muscovite mica tape with silicon resin.

products.name: PVC Compound
products.description: For low-voltage cables, telecommunication lines, and electrical wiring. Leading supplier meeting all international standards.

product_categories.name: Data Cable
product_categories.description: Raw materials for manufacturing data cables including CAT-5/6/7 LAN cables

products.name: LSZH
products.description: Halogen Free Flame Retardant/Zero Halogen Flame Retardant Polyolefin Based Sheathing Compounds for Data cables.

products.name: PVC CMR
products.description: Lead free 80°C Rated, Sunlight resistant, Highly Flame-Retardant jacket compound with good low temperature & excellent electrical properties.

products.name: Aluminium-PET Lamination Foils
products.description: Aluminum foil applied to the shielding layer of communication cables, which can effectively reduce interference.

products.name: PE Compound
products.description: Discontinuous tape polyethylene compound for data cable applications.

products.name: Tapes
products.description: PE compound-based tapes for data cable construction.

products.name: PVC Compound
products.description: Cross-linkable polyethylene compound available in Peroxide-XLPE, Silane-XLPE, and TR-XLPE variants for data cables.

product_categories.name: Freight Forwarding & Warehousing
product_categories.description: End-to-end logistics from manufacturer to customer. Warehousing in India & USA. Handles $10M in shipments annually.

partners: Zhejiang Wanma Co. Ltd. (China) — largest cable compound manufacturer in Asia, OEM partner since 2015
Unitape (UK) — ECCS tape with CJB innovation
Nantong Siber — water-blocking tapes & yarns, partner since 2013
Chhaperia International Company (India) — Mica tapes, partner since Q2 FY22
